gap_metrics.definition: monthly weight routed to cash because it is unmapped, low quality, missing a price, or otherwise untradable

warnings: Execution backtest uses ETF proxy qfq prices and only covers tradable ETF periods.
This execution backtest is an ETF proxy validation, not a production trading instruction.
This report uses Tushare ETF qfq price data.

reasons: Months containing any execution-weight gap exceed 20%; this does not mean the whole portfolio was untradable.

reason_details.message: Months containing any execution-weight gap exceed 20%; this does not mean the whole portfolio was untradable.

decision.warning: This is not production approval or a trading instruction.
